sentiment: The quietest signal finds you when you stop pretending to be awake.

stories.title: Marfa Public Radio Puts You to Sleep
stories.summary: A West Texas radio station designed to lull you into rest — permission to stop performing wakefulness.

stories.title: Decomp Academy: Interactive PPC Decompilation Lessons
stories.summary: Learning to read what was always hidden beneath the surface — every instruction a small revelation.
